SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.controller.menu

Class EndlessGameOverController

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.menu.EndlessGameOverController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class EndlessGameOverController extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
Controller for the Endless Mode Game Over screen.

This controller manages the full-screen game over interface for Endless Mode, displaying the final score, leaderboard, and providing options to try again or return to the main menu. The interface is designed as a complete scene rather than an overlay, providing a more immersive experience.

Key Features:

  • Full-screen game over interface
  • Score display with statistics
  • Interactive leaderboard
  • Celebration animations for new high scores
  • Keyboard navigation support

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable

    • showGameOver

      public void showGameOver(int finalScore, int linesCleared, int level, long playTimeMs, boolean isNewHighScore, int rank)
      Displays the game over screen with final game statistics and leaderboard. Updates all UI components and triggers celebration animation if a new high score was achieved.
      Parameters:
      finalScore - the final score achieved in this game session
      linesCleared - the total number of lines cleared during the game
      level - the highest level reached before game over
      playTimeMs - the total play time in milliseconds
      isNewHighScore - true if this score qualifies as a new high score
      rank - the player's rank in the leaderboard (1-5 if in top 5, 0 otherwise)

    • handleKeyPress

      public void handleKeyPress(javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent event)
      Handles keyboard input for screen navigation. Supports N (try again), ESCAPE (back to menu), ENTER (activate focused button), and TAB (cycle buttons).
      Parameters:
      event - the key event to process

    • setOnTryAgain

      public void setOnTryAgain(Runnable callback)
      Sets the callback executed when the Try Again button is clicked.
      Parameters:
      callback - the runnable to execute, may be null

    • setOnResetLeaderboard

      public void setOnResetLeaderboard(Runnable callback)
      Sets the callback executed when the Reset Leaderboard button is clicked.
      Parameters:
      callback - the runnable to execute, may be null

    • setOnBackToMenu

      public void setOnBackToMenu(Runnable callback)
      Sets the callback executed when the Back to Menu button is clicked.
      Parameters:
      callback - the runnable to execute, may be null

    • refreshLeaderboard

      public void refreshLeaderboard()
      Refreshes the leaderboard display with updated data. Typically called after the leaderboard has been cleared or modified.
